title: L&T Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: L&T Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
